summary.intent: Automate PR review response and CI monitoring for PR #90, then fix a bun 1.3.12 bug where `bun install -g` fails to create the claude binary symlink in ~/.bun/bin/.
summary.outcome: Successfully responded to and resolved 8 review comments on PR #90, investigated the bun global install binary issue, and updated the CI workflow to use the official Claude installer (`curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash`) instead of `npm install -g`.

repo: CLAUDE.md explicitly prohibits npm/yarn usage, but npm install -g was temporarily used as a workaround for the bun 1.3.12 binary creation bug.
The CI workflow uses validate-plugin.yaml under .github/workflows/ to install and run claude.
The official Claude Code installer is available at https://claude.ai/install.sh and is the preferred installation method.

code.finding: Claude installation was changed from `npm install -g` to `curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash` to comply with CLAUDE.md rules and avoid npm dependency.

workflow: bun install -g silently fails to create binary symlinks in ~/.bun/bin/ — it reports 'installed with binaries: claude' but the symlink is never created; this is a known chronic bun bug (oven-sh/bun#6967, #2626, #5976).
When bun global install fails to create binaries, falling back to npm install -g works but violates project conventions; the official install script is the cleaner alternative.
The devin-ai-integration bot actively reviews PRs and flags issues like leftover debug output and CLAUDE.md rule violations.

friction: bun 1.3.12 bug: `bun install -g` reports successful installation with binaries but does not actually create the claude symlink in ~/.bun/bin/, breaking CI.
Using npm install -g as a workaround violated the project's CLAUDE.md rule prohibiting npm/yarn, triggering a review comment.
No bun issue specifically tracking the 1.3.12 regression was found; related issues exist but are closed or cover slightly different failure modes.
open_items: Consider filing a new bun issue specifically for the 1.3.12 binary symlink regression, as no exact match was found among existing reports.
Verify the curl-based Claude installer works correctly in CI once the updated workflow runs.
